examples.title: Algorithm: FCFS Scheduling
examples.description: First-Come First-Served scheduling implementation with waiting time calculation
examples.code:
ALGORITHM FCFS_Scheduling
BEGIN
 Sort processes by arrival time
 current_time = 0
 FOR each process in order DO
 IF current_time < process.arrival_time
 current_time = process.arrival_time
 process.waiting_time = current_time - process.arrival_time
 current_time += process.burst_time
 process.turnaround_time = current_time - process.arrival_time
 END FOR
 Calculate average waiting time
END
examples.explanation:
1. Processes sorted by arrival time
2. Tracks current simulation time
3. Computes waiting time as (start time - arrival time)
4. Updates turnaround time after completion

examples.title: SJF Non-Preemptive Implementation
examples.description: Shortest Job First scheduling with burst time sorting
examples.explanation:
1. Sort processes by arrival time and burst time
2. Track current simulation time
3. Calculate waiting time for each process
4. Update turnaround time after process completion

examples.title: Algorithm: Round Robin Scheduling
examples.description: Time-sharing scheduling with fixed time quantum
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Round_Robin
BEGIN
 Create ready queue
 current_time = 0
 WHILE processes remaining DO
 process = dequeue()
 exec_time = min(process.remaining, quantum)
 current_time += exec_time
 process.remaining -= exec_time
 
 IF process.remaining > 0
 enqueue(process)
 ELSE
 process.turnaround = current_time - process.arrival
 END IF
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation:
1. Uses circular queue for ready processes
2. Allocates fixed time quantum per execution
3. Tracks remaining burst time
4. Requeues unfinished processes

examples.title: Priority Scheduling Implementation
examples.description: Non-preemptive priority-based scheduling with lower number = higher priority
examples.explanation:
1. Bubble sort by priority and arrival time
2. Track current simulation time
3. Calculate waiting time as start time - arrival
4. Compute turnaround time after completion
